visualization.description: Tabular visualization showing each student’s major, minor, and advisor. Each row represents a student, while columns represent the respective fields.
Bar chart showing the count of students per department, categorized by majors and minors. An additional line overlays the expected count to highlight anomalies.

effect.description: Selecting a department filters the data for the heat map in View 4.

visualization.description: Scatter plot showing the relationship between student age and extracurricular memberships by appointment type.

components: Sliders for filtering age range and dropdowns for selecting sex.

encodings: color: count of students in each major-minor combination
visualization.description: Heat map where rows represent majors and columns represent minors, showing the intensity of combinations by the number of students.

components: Button for drilldown to explore detailed combinations.

effect.description: Hovering over a cell displays the count of students for that specific major-minor combination.
Drill into a selected combination to view detailed student information.

visualization.description: Pie chart showing the proportion of departments within each division for majors and minors, facilitating comparison between divisions.

components: Tooltip to display exact numbers and department details.
